design_contract.audience_context: Returning users selecting a route on mobile.
design_contract.preferences: Editorial clarity; no decorative neon effects.
design_contract.concept: Local routes form an explorable index.

authored_distinction.target: Synchronize route selection with local stories.
authored_distinction.evidence: Fixed brief and product content model.

brand_evidence.source: No official brand source was supplied.
brand_evidence.rule: Do not infer a complete brand personality.

forbidden: Do not override product semantics or accessibility.

pattern_decisions.task_evidence: The top task requires route selection.
pattern_decisions.mobile_transform: Collapse into a thumb-reachable route list.

mobile_transformations: Replace the desktop index with a thumb-reachable route list.

evidence_ceiling.reason: Browser, visual, measurement, and independent-review capabilities are unavailable.

release_decision.reason: Browser and rendered review remain unavailable.

claims.claim: Browser behavior has not been executed.

risks: Browser and rendered behavior remain unverified.
